calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2025 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: D. Diaz; Not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2025 Continued To Oct-14-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursaunt To Stipulation Of The Parties
Off Calendar Feb-25-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursaunt To Stipulation Of The Parties

The unopposed motion for entry of judgment is granted in part and denied in part. The parties stipulated to entry of judgment against defendant Tzetzangari Moreno in the amount of $29,888.24, what the stipulation deems the "Judgment Amount." (Ex. 1 to Zarco Dec. at para. 1.) But the stipulation further provided that entry of the judgment would be deferred and Moreno would make payments to Bank of America. (Id. paras. 3-4.) If Moreno failed to make timely payments, Bank of America could seek entry of judgment for "the Judgment Amount plus any motion and/or order fee(s) required by the court, less credit for payments made." (Id. para. 7.) The Zarco declaration shows that Moreno paid $14,000. The fee for filing this motion was $60. Accordingly, the court grants the motion and will enter judgment in the amount of $15,948.24 in favor of Plaintiff. Plaintiff shall prepare a separate proposed order and judgment conforming to this order in accordance with Rule of Court 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
